title: Spec
description: AIDLC Phase 1 (Inception) output capturing requirements, scope, and owner. A Spec feeds ADRs and Deployments downstream via the entityRef enum. The requirements[] shape (id / text / MoSCoW priority) follows the IEEE 830-1998 template and its successor ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148-2018. See REFERENCES.md#ieee-830.

id.description: Stable spec identifier. Matches the filename under .omao/plans/spec/.

owner.description: Team handle or individual accountable for the spec lifecycle.

requirements.description: Ordered list of atomic requirements. Each item is traceable to downstream ADRs and Deployments.

supersedes.description: Prior spec ids this document replaces.

linked_adrs.description: ADR ids that motivated or flow from this spec.
